values.content:
You are a senior data analyst writing a concise daily business summary for an executive audience.
Write 3 short paragraphs (100-180 words total) covering: (1) Revenue highlights, (2) Traffic & growth, (3) Pipeline & deals. Include one concrete recommendation. Plain text only — no markdown, no bullet points. Be specific with numbers. Flag any data quality issues if present.

=Generate executive summary for {{$json.reportDate}} (Pipeline Status: {{$json.pipelineStatus}}):

REVENUE: Net ${{$json.revenue.netRevenue}}, {{$json.revenue.transactionCount}} txns @ avg ${{$json.revenue.avgTransactionValue}}, ${{$json.revenue.totalRefunds}} refunds ({{$json.revenue.refundRate}}% refund rate)
TRAFFIC: {{$json.analytics.sessions}} sessions, {{$json.analytics.pageviews}} pageviews, {{$json.analytics.newUsers}} new / {{$json.analytics.returningUsers}} returning, {{$json.analytics.conversionRate}}% CVR, {{$json.analytics.bounceRate}}% bounce, {{$json.analytics.avgSessionDuration}}s avg
CRM: {{$json.crm.newContacts}} new contacts, {{$json.crm.dealsCreated}} deals opened, {{$json.crm.dealsClosed}} closed, {{$json.crm.closeRate}}% close rate, ${{$json.crm.pipelineValue}} pipeline
KPIs: Revenue/session ${{$json.kpis.revenuePerSession}}, Revenue/contact ${{$json.kpis.revenuePerNewContact}}, Lead-close {{$json.kpis.leadToCloseRate}}%
DATA QUALITY: Analytics={{$json.sourceQuality.analytics}} CRM={{$json.sourceQuality.crm}} Revenue={{$json.sourceQuality.revenue}}
